question: Romaka Siddhanta written by Varahamihira deals with :
Which one of the following books was not written by Harshavardhana ?
Which of the following statements is incorrect with reference to Permanent Settlement ?

options.1: It was introduced by Lord Cornwallis in Bengal, Bihar and Orissa in 1795.
options.2: It declared Zamindars as the owners of the land and they were given hereditary rights.
options.3: It was planned by John Shore.
options.4: The amount to be paid by the landlords was fixed.
